summary: Executive user ESPN/Sunday Night Baseball - Feed Select modal
description:
GIVEN a user has EXEC entitlement
AND ESPN Sunday Night Baseball is scheduled/live

steps.action: WHEN a user selects a scheduled/live ESPN Sunday Night Baseball game tile
steps.result:
THEN a feed select modal displays
AND the user will see an ESPN feed button for the home team
AND the user achieves playback after selecting the feed button
